demo.title: monitor-kalshi.sh
demo.code:
# Run watchlist; alerts only on movement
aeon-monitor-kalshi

# Watchlist entry shape:
#   ticker: PRES-2028-DEM
#   side: NO
#   entry: 0.62
#   target: 0.45
#   kill: 0.78

setup: Set `KALSHI_API_KEY` / credentials; account must satisfy CFTC eligibility
Configure the watchlist YAML with side, entry, target, kill per ticker
